flow-definition.description: project-examples maven-example: JFrog CLI mvn-config, jf mvn, Build Info, rt build-publish.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: JFROG_SERVER_ID
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: JFrog Platform Server ID from Jenkins system config.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: JFROG_BUILD_NAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Build name for JFrog Build Info. Empty = job short name (JOB_BASE_NAME).

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: RESOLVE_RELEASES
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Maven repo key for resolving releases (Artifactory virtual).

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: RESOLVE_SNAPSHOTS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Maven repo key for resolving snapshots.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DEPLOY_RELEASES
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Maven local repo for deploying releases.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DEPLOY_SNAPSHOTS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Maven local repo for deploying snapshots.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: MVN_GOALS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Maven goals passed to jf mvn (space-separated).
